title: Versona request ledger entry
description: One JSON object appended as a line to forge-logs/versona-track/request-ledger.jsonl. Correlates intake with sessions; does not replace Ore/Ingot/Spark IDs.

ledger_entry_id.description: Opaque correlation ID (e.g. UUID). Not a Forge work-item ID.

recorded_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 when the intake was recorded.

work_item_refs.description: Handles the team already uses: Ore, Ingot, Spark, WBS, or external ALM keys.

work_item_kind.description: Optional hint aligned with VERSONA-FRAMEWORK session manifest.

intent_summary.description: Short human-readable reason for the request.

status.description: Operational intake status, not Forge ore/ingot/spark state.

primary_session_path.description: Repo-relative path to forge-logs/versona/<actor>/<session-id>/ when known.

session_ids.description: session_id values from manifests for all sessions spawned from this request.

source.description: Who or what created the ledger line.

source_ref.description: Optional URL, ticket key, or run ID from the source system.

compliance_marking.description: Optional org-controlled label when external compliance applies.
